title: Trade Policy Dilemmas Faced by India: A Tale of Two Industries

summary.about: The tension between protecting Indian industries and exposing them to competition so they become globally competitive.
summary.audience: Indian trade and industrial policymakers and business leaders.
summary.method: A qualitative policy commentary using industry examples and export-oriented industrialization experience.
summary.insights: Temporary protection can help, but lasting growth depends on firms learning to compete domestically and internationally.
